subcodes.first_line: Hallowed praise be sanctified above the affairs of the world and the intimations of nations, beyond the doubts of the assailants and the clamor of the deniers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از شئونات عالم و اشارات امم و شبهات معتدین و ضوضاء معرضین ساحت امنع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
